prompt: Create a vertical close-up photographic portrait of a young woman with long deep burgundy red hair, seated against a muted dark green studio wall. The composition is tight from the upper chest to just above the head, with the subject centered slightly left and leaning subtly forward. Her face is completely covered by one large opaque rectangular privacy block, positioned over the entire face from forehead to mouth, colored as a soft brown skin-tone gradient from dark brown on the left to warmer tan on the right, with crisp straight edges. Visible details should include loose strands of red hair catching sunlight, hair falling over both shoulders, a gray crew-neck T-shirt, a softly shadowed neck and collarbone area, and a small portion of a dark jacket or chair edge at the right side. Use dramatic natural sunlight from the upper left, creating strong highlights on the red hair, deep shadows on the left side, realistic skin texture where visible, cinematic contrast, shallow depth of field, and a moody editorial portrait style. Background should remain plain, softly blurred, and olive green. No text, no logos, no extra objects.
